chapters.zh: 以色列的众子，各带家眷，和雅各一同来到埃及。他们的名字记在下面。
chapters.en: Now these the names of the children of Israel, which came into Egypt; every man and his household came with Jacob.

chapters.zh: 有流便、西缅、利未、犹大、
chapters.en: Reuben, Simeon, Levi, and Judah,

chapters.zh: 以萨迦、西布伦、便雅悯、
chapters.en: Issachar, Zebulun, and Benjamin,

chapters.zh: 但、拿弗他利、迦得、亚设。
chapters.en: Dan, and Naphtali, Gad, and Asher.

chapters.zh: 凡从雅各而生的，共有七十人。约瑟已经在埃及。
chapters.en: And all the souls that came out of the loins of Jacob were seventy souls: for Joseph was in Egypt .

chapters.zh: 约瑟和他的弟兄，并那一代的人，都死了。
chapters.en: And Joseph died, and all his brethren, and all that generation.

chapters.zh: 以色列人生养众多，并且繁茂，极其强盛，满了那地。
chapters.en: And the children of Israel were fruitful, and increased abundantly, and multiplied, and waxed exceeding mighty; and the land was filled with them.

chapters.zh: 有不认识约瑟的新王起来，治理埃及，
chapters.en: Now there arose up a new king over Egypt, which knew not Joseph.

chapters.zh: 对他的百姓说：看哪，这以色列民比我们还多，又比我们强盛。
chapters.en: And he said unto his people, Behold, the people of the children of Israel more and mightier than we:

chapters.zh: 来罢，我们不如用巧计待他们，恐怕他们多起来，日后若遇甚么争战的事，就连合我们的仇敌攻击我们，离开这地去了。
chapters.en: Come on, let us deal wisely with them; lest they multiply, and it come to pass, that, when there falleth out any war, they join also unto our enemies, and fight against us, and get them up out of the land.

chapters.zh: 于是埃及人派督工的辖制他们，加重担苦害他们。他们为法老建造两座积货城，就是比东和兰塞。
chapters.en: Therefore they did set over them taskmasters to afflict them with their burdens. And they built for Pharaoh treasure cities, Pithom and Raamses.

chapters.zh: 只是越发苦害他们，他们越发多起来，越发蔓延；埃及人就因以色列人愁烦。
chapters.en: But the more they afflicted them, the more they multiplied and grew. And they were grieved because of the children of Israel.

chapters.zh: 埃及人严严的使以色列人做工，
chapters.en: And the Egyptians made the children of Israel to serve with rigour:

chapters.zh: 使他们因做苦工觉得命苦；无论是和泥，是作砖，是作田间各样的工，在一切的工上都严严的待他们。
chapters.en: And they made their lives bitter with hard bondage, in morter, and in brick, and in all manner of service in the field: all their service, wherein they made them serve, with rigour.

chapters.zh: 有希伯来的两个收生婆，一名施弗拉，一名普阿；埃及王对他们说：
chapters.en: And the king of Egypt spake to the Hebrew midwives, of which the name of the one Shiphrah, and the name of the other Puah:

chapters.zh: 你们为希伯来妇人收生，看他们临盆的时候，若是男孩，就把他杀了；若是女孩，就留他存活。
chapters.en: And he said, When ye do the office of a midwife to the Hebrew women, and see upon the stools; if it a son, then ye shall kill him: but if it a daughter, then she shall live.

chapters.zh: 但是收生婆敬畏神，不照埃及王的吩咐行，竟存留男孩的性命。
chapters.en: But the midwives feared God, and did not as the king of Egypt commanded them, but saved the men children alive.

chapters.zh: 埃及王召了收生婆来，说：你们为甚么做这事，存留男孩的性命呢？
chapters.en: And the king of Egypt called for the midwives, and said unto them, Why have ye done this thing, and have saved the men children alive?

chapters.zh: 收生婆对法老说：因为希伯来妇人与埃及妇人不同；希伯来妇人本是健壮的（原文作活泼的），收生婆还没有到，他们已经生产了。
chapters.en: And the midwives said unto Pharaoh, Because the Hebrew women not as the Egyptian women; for they lively, and are delivered ere the midwives come in unto them.

chapters.zh: 神厚待收生婆。以色列人多起来，极其强盛。
chapters.en: Therefore God dealt well with the midwives: and the people multiplied, and waxed very mighty.

chapters.zh: 收生婆因为敬畏神，神便叫他们成立家室。
chapters.en: And it came to pass, because the midwives feared God, that he made them houses.

chapters.zh: 法老吩咐他的众民说：以色列人所生的男孩，你们都要丢在河里；一切的女孩，你们要存留他的性命。
chapters.en: And Pharaoh charged all his people, saying, Every son that is born ye shall cast into the river, and every daughter ye shall save alive.

chapters.zh: 有一个利未家的人娶了一个利未女子为妻。
chapters.en: And there went a man of the house of Levi, and took a daughter of Levi.

chapters.zh: 那女人怀孕，生一个儿子，见他俊美，就藏了他三个月，
chapters.en: And the woman conceived, and bare a son: and when she saw him that he goodly , she hid him three months.

chapters.zh: 后来不能再藏，就取了一个蒲草箱，抹上石漆和石油，将孩子放在里头，把箱子搁在河边的芦荻中。
chapters.en: And when she could not longer hide him, she took for him an ark of bulrushes, and daubed it with slime and with pitch, and put the child therein; and she laid in the flags by the river's brink.

chapters.zh: 孩子的姊姊远远站著，要知道他究竟怎么样。
chapters.en: And his sister stood afar off, to wit what would be done to him.

chapters.zh: 法老的女儿来到河边洗澡，他的使女们在河边行走。他看见箱子在芦荻中，就打发一个婢女拿来。
chapters.en: And the daughter of Pharaoh came down to wash at the river; and her maidens walked along by the river's side; and when she saw the ark among the flags, she sent her maid to fetch it.

chapters.zh: 他打开箱子，看见那孩子。孩子哭了，他就可怜他，说：「这是希伯来人的一个孩子。」
chapters.en: And when she had opened , she saw the child: and, behold, the babe wept. And she had compassion on him, and said, This of the Hebrews' children.

chapters.zh: 孩子的姊姊对法老的女儿说：「我去在希伯来妇人中叫一个奶妈来，为你奶这孩子，可以不可以？」
chapters.en: Then said his sister to Pharaoh's daughter, Shall I go and call to thee a nurse of the Hebrew women, that she may nurse the child for thee?

chapters.zh: 法老的女儿说：「可以。」童女就去叫了孩子的母亲来。
chapters.en: And Pharaoh's daughter said to her, Go. And the maid went and called the child's mother.

chapters.zh: 法老的女儿对他说：「你把这孩子抱去，为我奶他，我必给你工价。」妇人就抱了孩子去奶他。
chapters.en: And Pharaoh's daughter said unto her, Take this child away, and nurse it for me, and I will give thy wages. And the woman took the child, and nursed it.

chapters.zh: 孩子渐长，妇人把他带到法老的女儿那里，就作了他的儿子。他给孩子起名叫摩西，意思说：因我把他从水里拉出来。
chapters.en: And the child grew, and she brought him unto Pharaoh's daughter, and he became her son. And she called his name Moses: and she said, Because I drew him out of the water.

chapters.zh: 后来，摩西长大，他出去到他弟兄那里，看他们的重担，见一个埃及人打希伯来人的一个弟兄。
chapters.en: And it came to pass in those days, when Moses was grown, that he went out unto his brethren, and looked on their burdens: and he spied an Egyptian smiting an Hebrew, one of his brethren.

chapters.zh: 他左右观看，见没有人，就把埃及人打死了，藏在沙土里。
chapters.en: And he looked this way and that way, and when he saw that no man, he slew the Egyptian, and hid him in the sand.

chapters.zh: 第二天他出去，见有两个希伯来人争斗，就对那欺负人的说：「你为甚么打你同族的人呢？」
chapters.en: And when he went out the second day, behold, two men of the Hebrews strove together: and he said to him that did the wrong, Wherefore smitest thou thy fellow?

chapters.zh: 那人说：「谁立你作我们的首领和审判官呢？难道你要杀我，像杀那埃及人么？」摩西便惧怕，说：「这事必是被人知道了。」
chapters.en: And he said, Who made thee a prince and a judge over us? intendest thou to kill me, as thou killedst the Egyptian? And Moses feared, and said, Surely this thing is known.

chapters.zh: 法老听见这事，就想杀摩西，但摩西躲避法老，逃往米甸地居住。
chapters.en: Now when Pharaoh heard this thing, he sought to slay Moses. But Moses fled from the face of Pharaoh, and dwelt in the land of Midian: and he sat down by a well.

chapters.zh: 一日，他在井旁坐下。米甸的祭司有七个女儿；他们来打水，打满了槽，要饮父亲的群羊。
chapters.en: Now the priest of Midian had seven daughters: and they came and drew , and filled the troughs to water their father's flock.

chapters.zh: 有牧羊的人来，把他们赶走了，摩西却起来帮助他们，又饮了他们的群羊。
chapters.en: And the shepherds came and drove them away: but Moses stood up and helped them, and watered their flock.

chapters.zh: 他们来到父亲流珥那里；他说：「今日你们为何来得这么快呢？」
chapters.en: And when they came to Reuel their father, he said, How ye are come so soon to day?

chapters.zh: 他们说：「有一个埃及人救我们脱离牧羊人的手，并且为我们打水饮了群羊。」
chapters.en: And they said, An Egyptian delivered us out of the hand of the shepherds, and also drew enough for us, and watered the flock.

chapters.zh: 他对女儿们说：「那个人在那里？你们为甚么撇下他呢？你们去请他来吃饭。」
chapters.en: And he said unto his daughters, And where he? why it ye have left the man? call him, that he may eat bread.

chapters.zh: 摩西甘心和那人同住；那人把他的女儿西坡拉给摩西为妻。
chapters.en: And Moses was content to dwell with the man: and he gave Moses Zipporah his daughter.

chapters.zh: 西坡拉生了一个儿子，摩西给他起名叫革舜，意思说：「因我在外邦作了寄居的。」
chapters.en: And she bare a son, and he called his name Gershom: for he said, I have been a stranger in a strange land.

chapters.zh: 过了多年，埃及王死了。以色列人因做苦工，就叹息哀求，他们的哀声达于神。
chapters.en: And it came to pass in process of time, that the king of Egypt died: and the children of Israel sighed by reason of the bondage, and they cried, and their cry came up unto God by reason of the bondage.

chapters.zh: 神听见他们的哀声，就记念他与亚伯拉罕、以撒、雅各所立的约。
chapters.en: And God heard their groaning, and God remembered his covenant with Abraham, with Isaac, and with Jacob.

chapters.zh: 神看顾以色列人，也知道他们的苦情。
chapters.en: And God looked upon the children of Israel, and God had respect unto .

chapters.zh: 摩西牧养他岳父米甸祭司叶忒罗的羊群；一日领羊群往野外去，到了神的山，就是何烈山。
chapters.en: Now Moses kept the flock of Jethro his father in law, the priest of Midian: and he led the flock to the backside of the desert, and came to the mountain of God, to Horeb.

chapters.zh: 耶和华的使者从荆棘里火燄中向摩西显现。摩西观看，不料，荆棘被火烧著，却没有烧毁。
chapters.en: And the angel of the LORD appeared unto him in a flame of fire out of the midst of a bush: and he looked, and, behold, the bush burned with fire, and the bush not consumed.

chapters.zh: 摩西说：我要过去看这大异象，这荆棘为何没有烧坏呢？
chapters.en: And Moses said, I will now turn aside, and see this great sight, why the bush is not burnt.

chapters.zh: 耶和华神见他过去要看，就从荆棘里呼叫说：摩西！摩西！他说：我在这里。
chapters.en: And when the LORD saw that he turned aside to see, God called unto him out of the midst of the bush, and said, Moses, Moses. And he said, Here I.

chapters.zh: 神说：不要近前来。当把你脚上的鞋脱下来，因为你所站之地是圣地；
chapters.en: And he said, Draw not nigh hither: put off thy shoes from off thy feet, for the place whereon thou standest holy ground.

chapters.zh: 又说：我是你父亲的神，是亚伯拉罕的神，以撒的神，雅各的神。摩西蒙上脸，因为怕看神。
chapters.en: Moreover he said, I the God of thy father, the God of Abraham, the God of Isaac, and the God of Jacob. And Moses hid his face; for he was afraid to look upon God.

chapters.zh: 耶和华说：我的百姓在埃及所受的困苦，我实在看见了；他们因受督工的辖制所发的哀声，我也听见了。我原知道他们的痛苦，
chapters.en: And the LORD said, I have surely seen the affliction of my people which in Egypt, and have heard their cry by reason of their taskmasters; for I know their sorrows;

chapters.zh: 我下来是要救他们脱离埃及人的手，领他们出了那地，到美好、宽阔、流奶与蜜之地，就是到迦南人、赫人、亚摩利人、比利洗人、希未人、耶布斯人之地。
chapters.en: And I am come down to deliver them out of the hand of the Egyptians, and to bring them up out of that land unto a good land and a large, unto a land flowing with milk and honey; unto the place of the Canaanites, and the Hittites, and the Amorites, and the Perizzites, and the Hivites, and the Jebusites.

chapters.zh: 现在以色列人的哀声达到我耳中，我也看见埃及人怎样欺压他们。
chapters.en: Now therefore, behold, the cry of the children of Israel is come unto me: and I have also seen the oppression wherewith the Egyptians oppress them.

chapters.zh: 故此，我要打发你去见法老，使你可以将我的百姓以色列人从埃及领出来。
chapters.en: Come now therefore, and I will send thee unto Pharaoh, that thou mayest bring forth my people the children of Israel out of Egypt.

chapters.zh: 摩西对神说：我是甚么人，竟能去见法老，将以色列人从埃及领出来呢？
chapters.en: And Moses said unto God, Who I, that I should go unto Pharaoh, and that I should bring forth the children of Israel out of Egypt?

chapters.zh: 神说：我必与你同在。你将百姓从埃及领出来之后，你们必在这山上事奉我；这就是我打发你去的证据。
chapters.en: And he said, Certainly I will be with thee; and this a token unto thee, that I have sent thee: When thou hast brought forth the people out of Egypt, ye shall serve God upon this mountain.

chapters.zh: 摩西对神说：我到以色列人那里，对他们说：你们祖宗的神打发我到你们这里来。他们若问我说：他叫甚么名字？我要对他们说甚么呢？
chapters.en: And Moses said unto God, Behold, I come unto the children of Israel, and shall say unto them, The God of your fathers hath sent me unto you; and they shall say to me, What his name? what shall I say unto them?

chapters.zh: 神对摩西说：我是自有永有的；又说：你要对以色列人这样说：那自有的打发我到你们这里来。
chapters.en: And God said unto Moses, I AM THAT I AM: and he said, Thus shalt thou say unto the children of Israel, I AM hath sent me unto you.

chapters.zh: 神又对摩西说：你要对以色列人这样说：耶和华 ─ 你们祖宗的神，就是亚伯拉罕的神，以撒的神，雅各的神，打发我到你们这里来。耶和华是我的名，直到永远；这也是我的纪念，直到万代。
chapters.en: And God said moreover unto Moses, Thus shalt thou say unto the children of Israel, The LORD God of your fathers, the God of Abraham, the God of Isaac, and the God of Jacob, hath sent me unto you: this my name for ever, and this my memorial unto all generations.

chapters.zh: 你去招聚以色列的长老，对他们说：耶和华你们祖宗的神，就是亚伯拉罕的神，以撒的神，雅各的神，向我显现，说：我实在眷顾了你们，我也看见埃及人怎样待你们。
chapters.en: Go, and gather the elders of Israel together, and say unto them, The LORD God of your fathers, the God of Abraham, of Isaac, and of Jacob, appeared unto me, saying, I have surely visited you, and that which is done to you in Egypt:

chapters.zh: 我也说：要将你们从埃及的困苦中领出来，往迦南人、赫人、亚摩利人、比利洗人、希未人、耶布斯人的地去，就是到流奶与蜜之地。
chapters.en: And I have said, I will bring you up out of the affliction of Egypt unto the land of the Canaanites, and the Hittites, and the Amorites, and the Perizzites, and the Hivites, and the Jebusites, unto a land flowing with milk and honey.

chapters.zh: 他们必听你的话。你和以色列的长老要去见埃及王，对他说：耶和华希伯来人的神遇见了我们，现在求你容我们往旷野去，走三天的路程，为要祭祀耶和华我们的神。
chapters.en: And they shall hearken to thy voice: and thou shalt come, thou and the elders of Israel, unto the king of Egypt, and ye shall say unto him, The LORD God of the Hebrews hath met with us: and now let us go, we beseech thee, three days' journey into the wilderness, that we may sacrifice to the LORD our God.

chapters.zh: 我知道虽用大能的手，埃及王也不容你们去。
chapters.en: And I am sure that the king of Egypt will not let you go, no, not by a mighty hand.

chapters.zh: 我必伸手在埃及中间施行我一切的奇事，攻击那地，然后他才容你们去。
chapters.en: And I will stretch out my hand, and smite Egypt with all my wonders which I will do in the midst thereof: and after that he will let you go.

chapters.zh: 我必叫你们在埃及人眼前蒙恩，你们去的时候就不至于空手而去。
chapters.en: And I will give this people favour in the sight of the Egyptians: and it shall come to pass, that, when ye go, ye shall not go empty:

chapters.zh: 但各妇女必向他的邻舍，并居住在他家里的女人，要金器银器和衣裳，好给你们的儿女穿戴。这样你们就把埃及人的财物夺去了。
chapters.en: But every woman shall borrow of her neighbour, and of her that sojourneth in her house, jewels of silver, and jewels of gold, and raiment: and ye shall put upon your sons, and upon your daughters; and ye shall spoil the Egyptians.

chapters.zh: 摩西回答说：他们必不信我，也不听我的话，必说：耶和华并没有向你显现。
chapters.en: And Moses answered and said, But, behold, they will not believe me, nor hearken unto my voice: for they will say, The LORD hath not appeared unto thee.

chapters.zh: 耶和华对摩西说：你手里是甚么？他说：是杖。
chapters.en: And the LORD said unto him, What that in thine hand? And he said, A rod.

chapters.zh: 耶和华说：丢在地上。他一丢下去，就变作蛇；摩西便跑开。
chapters.en: And he said, Cast it on the ground. And he cast it on the ground, and it became a serpent; and Moses fled from before it.

chapters.zh: 耶和华对摩西说：伸出手来，拿住他的尾巴，他必在你手中仍变为杖；
chapters.en: And the LORD said unto Moses, Put forth thine hand, and take it by the tail. And he put forth his hand, and caught it, and it became a rod in his hand:

chapters.zh: 如此好叫他们信耶和华 ─ 他们祖宗的神，就是亚伯拉罕的神，以撒的神，雅各的神，是向你显现了。
chapters.en: That they may believe that the LORD God of their fathers, the God of Abraham, the God of Isaac, and the God of Jacob, hath appeared unto thee.

chapters.zh: 耶和华又对他说：把手放在怀里。他就把手放在怀里，及至抽出来，不料，手长了大痲疯，有雪那样白。
chapters.en: And the LORD said furthermore unto him, Put now thine hand into thy bosom. And he put his hand into his bosom: and when he took it out, behold, his hand leprous as snow.

chapters.zh: 耶和华说：再把手放在怀里。他就再把手放在怀里，及至从怀里抽出来，不料，手已经复原，与周身的肉一样；
chapters.en: And he said, Put thine hand into thy bosom again. And he put his hand into his bosom again; and plucked it out of his bosom, and, behold, it was turned again as his flesh.

chapters.zh: 又说：倘或他们不听你的话，也不信头一个神迹，他们必信第二个神迹。
chapters.en: And it shall come to pass, if they will not believe thee, neither hearken to the voice of the first sign, that they will believe the voice of the latter sign.

chapters.zh: 这两个神迹若都不信，也不听你的话，你就从河里取些水，倒在旱地上，你从河里取的水必在旱地上变作血。
chapters.en: And it shall come to pass, if they will not believe also these two signs, neither hearken unto thy voice, that thou shalt take of the water of the river, and pour upon the dry : and the water which thou takest out of the river shall become blood upon the dry .

chapters.zh: 摩西对耶和华说：主阿，我素日不是能言的人，就是从你对仆人说话以后，也是这样。我本是拙口笨舌的。
chapters.en: And Moses said unto the LORD, O my Lord, I not eloquent, neither heretofore, nor since thou hast spoken unto thy servant: but I slow of speech, and of a slow tongue.

chapters.zh: 耶和华对他说：谁造人的口呢？谁使人口哑、耳聋、目明、眼瞎呢？岂不是我 ─ 耶和华么？
chapters.en: And the LORD said unto him, Who hath made man's mouth? or who maketh the dumb, or deaf, or the seeing, or the blind? have not I the LORD?

chapters.zh: 现在去罢，我必赐你口才，指教你所当说的话。
chapters.en: Now therefore go, and I will be with thy mouth, and teach thee what thou shalt say.

chapters.zh: 摩西说：主阿，你愿意打发谁，就打发谁去罢！
chapters.en: And he said, O my Lord, send, I pray thee, by the hand thou wilt send.

chapters.zh: 耶和华向摩西发怒说：不是有你的哥哥利未人亚伦么？我知道他是能言的；现在他出来迎接你，他一见你，心里就欢喜。
chapters.en: And the anger of the LORD was kindled against Moses, and he said, not Aaron the Levite thy brother? I know that he can speak well. And also, behold, he cometh forth to meet thee: and when he seeth thee, he will be glad in his heart.

chapters.zh: 你要将当说的话传给他；我也要赐你和他口才，又要指教你们所当行的事。
chapters.en: And thou shalt speak unto him, and put words in his mouth: and I will be with thy mouth, and with his mouth, and will teach you what ye shall do.

chapters.zh: 他要替你对百姓说话；你要以他当作口，他要以你当作神。
chapters.en: And he shall be thy spokesman unto the people: and he shall be, he shall be to thee instead of a mouth, and thou shalt be to him instead of God.

chapters.zh: 你手里要拿这杖，好行神迹。
chapters.en: And thou shalt take this rod in thine hand, wherewith thou shalt do signs.

chapters.zh: 于是，摩西回到他岳父叶忒罗那里，对他说：求你容我回去见我在埃及的弟兄，看他们还在不在。叶忒罗对摩西说：你可以平平安安地去罢！
chapters.en: And Moses went and returned to Jethro his father in law, and said unto him, Let me go, I pray thee, and return unto my brethren which in Egypt, and see whether they be yet alive. And Jethro said to Moses, Go in peace.

chapters.zh: 耶和华在米甸对摩西说：你要回埃及去，因为寻索你命的人都死了。
chapters.en: And the LORD said unto Moses in Midian, Go, return into Egypt: for all the men are dead which sought thy life.

chapters.zh: 摩西就带著妻子和两个儿子，叫他们骑上驴，回埃及地去。摩西手里拿著神的杖。
chapters.en: And Moses took his wife and his sons, and set them upon an ass, and he returned to the land of Egypt: and Moses took the rod of God in his hand.

chapters.zh: 耶和华对摩西说：你回到埃及的时候，要留意将我指示你的一切奇事行在法老面前。但我要使（或作：任凭；下同）他的心刚硬，他必不容百姓去。
chapters.en: And the LORD said unto Moses, When thou goest to return into Egypt, see that thou do all those wonders before Pharaoh, which I have put in thine hand: but I will harden his heart, that he shall not let the people go.

chapters.zh: 你要对法老说：耶和华这样说：以色列是我的儿子，我的长子。
chapters.en: And thou shalt say unto Pharaoh, Thus saith the LORD, Israel my son, my firstborn:

chapters.zh: 我对你说过：容我的儿子去，好事奉我。你还是不肯容他去。看哪，我要杀你的长子。
chapters.en: And I say unto thee, Let my son go, that he may serve me: and if thou refuse to let him go, behold, I will slay thy son, thy firstborn.

chapters.zh: 摩西在路上住宿的地方，耶和华遇见他，想要杀他。
chapters.en: And it came to pass by the way in the inn, that the LORD met him, and sought to kill him.

chapters.zh: 西坡拉就拿一块火石，割下他儿子的阳皮，丢在摩西脚前，说：你真是我的血郎了。
chapters.en: Then Zipporah took a sharp stone, and cut off the foreskin of her son, and cast at his feet, and said, Surely a bloody husband thou to me.

chapters.zh: 这样，耶和华才放了他。西坡拉说：你因割礼就是血郎了。
chapters.en: So he let him go: then she said, A bloody husband , because of the circumcision.

chapters.zh: 耶和华对亚伦说：你往旷野去迎接摩西。他就去，在神的山遇见摩西，和他亲嘴。
chapters.en: And the LORD said to Aaron, Go into the wilderness to meet Moses. And he went, and met him in the mount of God, and kissed him.

chapters.zh: 摩西将耶和华打发他所说的言语和嘱咐他所行的神迹都告诉了亚伦。
chapters.en: And Moses told Aaron all the words of the LORD who had sent him, and all the signs which he had commanded him.

chapters.zh: 摩西、亚伦就去招聚以色列的众长老。
chapters.en: And Moses and Aaron went and gathered together all the elders of the children of Israel:

chapters.zh: 亚伦将耶和华对摩西所说的一切话述说了一遍，又在百姓眼前行了那些神迹，
chapters.en: And Aaron spake all the words which the LORD had spoken unto Moses, and did the signs in the sight of the people.

chapters.zh: 百姓就信了。以色列人听见耶和华眷顾他们，鉴察他们的困苦，就低头下拜。
chapters.en: And the people believed: and when they heard that the LORD had visited the children of Israel, and that he had looked upon their affliction, then they bowed their heads and worshipped.

chapters.zh: 后来摩西、亚伦去对法老说：耶和华 ─ 以色列的神这样说：容我的百姓去，在旷野向我守节。
chapters.en: And afterward Moses and Aaron went in, and told Pharaoh, Thus saith the LORD God of Israel, Let my people go, that they may hold a feast unto me in the wilderness.

chapters.zh: 法老说：耶和华是谁，使我听他的话，容以色列人去呢？我不认识耶和华，也不容以色列人去！
chapters.en: And Pharaoh said, Who the LORD, that I should obey his voice to let Israel go? I know not the LORD, neither will I let Israel go.

chapters.zh: 他们说：希伯来人的神遇见了我们。求你容我们往旷野去，走三天的路程，祭祀耶和华 ─ 我们的神，免得他用瘟疫、刀兵攻击我们。
chapters.en: And they said, The God of the Hebrews hath met with us: let us go, we pray thee, three days' journey into the desert, and sacrifice unto the LORD our God; lest he fall upon us with pestilence, or with the sword.

chapters.zh: 埃及王对他们说：摩西、亚伦！你们为甚么叫百姓旷工呢？你们去担你们的担子罢！
chapters.en: And the king of Egypt said unto them, Wherefore do ye, Moses and Aaron, let the people from their works? get you unto your burdens.

chapters.zh: 又说：看哪，这地的以色列人如今众多，你们竟叫他们歇下担子！
chapters.en: And Pharaoh said, Behold, the people of the land now many, and ye make them rest from their burdens.

chapters.zh: 当天，法老吩咐督工的和官长说：
chapters.en: And Pharaoh commanded the same day the taskmasters of the people, and their officers, saying,

chapters.zh: 你们不可照常把草给百姓做砖，叫他们自己去捡草。
chapters.en: Ye shall no more give the people straw to make brick, as heretofore: let them go and gather straw for themselves.

chapters.zh: 他们素常做砖的数目，你们仍旧向他们要，一点不可减少；因为他们是懒惰的，所以呼求说：容我们去祭祀我们的神。
chapters.en: And the tale of the bricks, which they did make heretofore, ye shall lay upon them; ye shall not diminish thereof: for they idle; therefore they cry, saying, Let us go sacrifice to our God.

chapters.zh: 你们要把更重的工夫加在这些人身上，叫他们劳碌，不听虚谎的言语。
chapters.en: Let there more work be laid upon the men, that they may labour therein; and let them not regard vain words.

chapters.zh: 督工的和官长出来对百姓说：法老这样说：我不给你们草。
chapters.en: And the taskmasters of the people went out, and their officers, and they spake to the people, saying, Thus saith Pharaoh, I will not give you straw.

chapters.zh: 你们自己在那里能找草，就往那里去找罢！但你们的工一点不可减少。
chapters.en: Go ye, get you straw where ye can find it: yet not ought of your work shall be diminished.

chapters.zh: 于是百姓散在埃及遍地，捡碎秸当作草。
chapters.en: So the people were scattered abroad throughout all the land of Egypt to gather stubble instead of straw.

chapters.zh: 督工的催著说：你们一天当完一天的工，与先前有草一样。
chapters.en: And the taskmasters hasted , saying, Fulfil your works, daily tasks, as when there was straw.

chapters.zh: 法老督工的，责打他所派以色列人的官长，说：你们昨天今天为甚么没有照向来的数目做砖、完你们的工作呢？
chapters.en: And the officers of the children of Israel, which Pharaoh's taskmasters had set over them, were beaten, demanded, Wherefore have ye not fulfilled your task in making brick both yesterday and to day, as heretofore?

chapters.zh: 以色列人的官长就来哀求法老说：为甚么这样待你的仆人？
chapters.en: Then the officers of the children of Israel came and cried unto Pharaoh, saying, Wherefore dealest thou thus with thy servants?

chapters.zh: 督工的不把草给仆人，并且对我们说：做砖罢！看哪，你仆人挨了打，其实是你百姓的错。
chapters.en: There is no straw given unto thy servants, and they say to us, Make brick: and, behold, thy servants beaten; but the fault in thine own people.

chapters.zh: 但法老说：你们是懒惰的！你们是懒惰的！所以说：容我们去祭祀耶和华。
chapters.en: But he said, Ye idle, idle: therefore ye say, Let us go do sacrifice to the LORD.

chapters.zh: 现在你们去做工罢！草是不给你们的，砖却要如数交纳。
chapters.en: Go therefore now, work; for there shall no straw be given you, yet shall ye deliver the tale of bricks.

chapters.zh: 以色列人的官长听说你们每天做砖的工作一点不可减少，就知道是遭遇祸患了。
chapters.en: And the officers of the children of Israel did see they in evil , after it was said, Ye shall not minish from your bricks of your daily task.

chapters.zh: 他们离了法老出来，正遇见摩西、亚伦站在对面，
chapters.en: And they met Moses and Aaron, who stood in the way, as they came forth from Pharaoh:

chapters.zh: 就向他们说：愿耶和华鉴察你们，施行判断；因你们使我们在法老和他臣仆面前有了臭名，把刀递在他们手中杀我们。
chapters.en: And they said unto them, The LORD look upon you, and judge; because ye have made our savour to be abhorred in the eyes of Pharaoh, and in the eyes of his servants, to put a sword in their hand to slay us.

chapters.zh: 摩西回到耶和华那里，说：主阿，你为甚么苦待这百姓呢？为甚么打发我去呢？
chapters.en: And Moses returned unto the LORD, and said, Lord, wherefore hast thou evil entreated this people? why it thou hast sent me?

chapters.zh: 自从我去见法老，奉你的名说话，他就苦待这百姓，你一点也没有拯救他们。
chapters.en: For since I came to Pharaoh to speak in thy name, he hath done evil to this people; neither hast thou delivered thy people at all.

chapters.zh: 耶和华对摩西说：现在你必看见我向法老所行的事，使他因我大能的手容以色列人去，且把他们赶出他的地。
chapters.en: Then the LORD said unto Moses, Now shalt thou see what I will do to Pharaoh: for with a strong hand shall he let them go, and with a strong hand shall he drive them out of his land.

chapters.zh: 神晓谕摩西说：我是耶和华。
chapters.en: And God spake unto Moses, and said unto him, I the LORD:

chapters.zh: 我从前向亚伯拉罕、以撒、雅各显现为全能的神；至于我名耶和华，他们未曾知道。
chapters.en: And I appeared unto Abraham, unto Isaac, and unto Jacob, by God Almighty, but by my name JEHOVAH was I not known to them.

chapters.zh: 我与他们坚定所立的约，要把他们寄居的迦南地赐给他们。
chapters.en: And I have also established my covenant with them, to give them the land of Canaan, the land of their pilgrimage, wherein they were strangers.

chapters.zh: 我也听见以色列人被埃及人苦待的哀声，我也记念我的约。
chapters.en: And I have also heard the groaning of the children of Israel, whom the Egyptians keep in bondage; and I have remembered my covenant.

chapters.zh: 所以你要对以色列人说：我是耶和华；我要用伸出来的膀臂重重的刑罚埃及人，救赎你们脱离他们的重担，不做他们的苦工。
chapters.en: Wherefore say unto the children of Israel, I the LORD, and I will bring you out from under the burdens of the Egyptians, and I will rid you out of their bondage, and I will redeem you with a stretched out arm, and with great judgments:

chapters.zh: 我要以你们为我的百姓，我也要作你们的神。你们要知道我是耶和华 ─ 你们的神，是救你们脱离埃及人之重担的。
chapters.en: And I will take you to me for a people, and I will be to you a God: and ye shall know that I the LORD your God, which bringeth you out from under the burdens of the Egyptians.

chapters.zh: 我起誓应许给亚伯拉罕、以撒、雅各的那地，我要把你们领进去，将那地赐给你们为业。我是耶和华。
chapters.en: And I will bring you in unto the land, concerning the which I did swear to give it to Abraham, to Isaac, and to Jacob; and I will give it you for an heritage: I the LORD.

chapters.zh: 摩西将这话告诉以色列人，只是他们因苦工愁烦，不肯听他的话。
chapters.en: And Moses spake so unto the children of Israel: but they hearkened not unto Moses for anguish of spirit, and for cruel bondage.

chapters.zh: 耶和华晓谕摩西说：
chapters.en: And the LORD spake unto Moses, saying,

chapters.zh: 你进去对埃及王法老说，要容以色列人出他的地。
chapters.en: Go in, speak unto Pharaoh king of Egypt, that he let the children of Israel go out of his land.

chapters.zh: 摩西在耶和华面前说：以色列人尚且不听我的话，法老怎肯听我这拙口笨舌的人呢？
chapters.en: And Moses spake before the LORD, saying, Behold, the children of Israel have not hearkened unto me; how then shall Pharaoh hear me, who of uncircumcised lips?

chapters.zh: 耶和华吩咐摩西、亚伦往以色列人和埃及王法老那里去，把以色列人从埃及地领出来。
chapters.en: And the LORD spake unto Moses and unto Aaron, and gave them a charge unto the children of Israel, and unto Pharaoh king of Egypt, to bring the children of Israel out of the land of Egypt.

chapters.zh: 以色列人家长的名字记在下面。以色列长子流便的儿子是哈诺、法路、希斯仑、迦米；这是流便的各家。
chapters.en: These the heads of their fathers' houses: The sons of Reuben the firstborn of Israel; Hanoch, and Pallu, Hezron, and Carmi: these the families of Reuben.

chapters.zh: 西缅的儿子是耶母利、雅悯、阿辖、雅斤、琐辖，和迦南女子的儿子扫罗；这是西缅的各家。
chapters.en: And the sons of Simeon; Jemuel, and Jamin, and Ohad, and Jachin, and Zohar, and Shaul the son of a Canaanitish woman: these the families of Simeon.

chapters.zh: 利未众子的名字按著他们的后代记在下面：就是革顺、哥辖、米拉利。利未一生的岁数是一百三十七岁。
chapters.en: And these the names of the sons of Levi according to their generations; Gershon, and Kohath, and Merari: and the years of the life of Levi an hundred thirty and seven years.

chapters.zh: 革顺的儿子按著家室是立尼、示每。
chapters.en: The sons of Gershon; Libni, and Shimi, according to their families.

chapters.zh: 哥辖的儿子是暗兰、以斯哈、希伯伦、乌薛。哥辖一生的岁数是一百三十三岁。
chapters.en: And the sons of Kohath; Amram, and Izhar, and Hebron, and Uzziel: and the years of the life of Kohath an hundred thirty and three years.

chapters.zh: 米拉利的儿子是抹利和母示；这是利未的家，都按著他们的后代。
chapters.en: And the sons of Merari; Mahali and Mushi: these the families of Levi according to their generations.

chapters.zh: 暗兰娶了他父亲的妹妹约基别为妻，他给他生了亚伦和摩西。暗兰一生的岁数是一百三十七岁。
chapters.en: And Amram took him Jochebed his father's sister to wife; and she bare him Aaron and Moses: and the years of the life of Amram an hundred and thirty and seven years.

chapters.zh: 以斯哈的儿子是可拉、尼斐、细基利。
chapters.en: And the sons of Izhar; Korah, and Nepheg, and Zichri.

chapters.zh: 乌薛的儿子是米沙利、以利撒反、西提利。
chapters.en: And the sons of Uzziel; Mishael, and Elzaphan, and Zithri.

chapters.zh: 亚伦娶了亚米拿达的女儿，拿顺的妹妹，以利沙巴为妻，他给他生了拿答、亚比户、以利亚撒、以他玛。
chapters.en: And Aaron took him Elisheba, daughter of Amminadab, sister of Naashon, to wife; and she bare him Nadab, and Abihu, Eleazar, and Ithamar.

chapters.zh: 可拉的儿子是亚惜、以利加拿、亚比亚撒；这是可拉的各家。
chapters.en: And the sons of Korah; Assir, and Elkanah, and Abiasaph: these the families of the Korhites.

chapters.zh: 亚伦的儿子以利亚撒娶了普铁的一个女儿为妻，他给他生了非尼哈。这是利未人的家长，都按著他们的家。
chapters.en: And Eleazar Aaron's son took him of the daughters of Putiel to wife; and she bare him Phinehas: these the heads of the fathers of the Levites according to their families.

chapters.zh: 耶和华说：将以色列人按著他们的军队从埃及地领出来。这是对那亚伦、摩西说的。
chapters.en: These that Aaron and Moses, to whom the LORD said, Bring out the children of Israel from the land of Egypt according to their armies.

chapters.zh: 对埃及王法老说要将以色列人从埃及领出来的，就是这摩西、亚伦。
chapters.en: These they which spake to Pharaoh king of Egypt, to bring out the children of Israel from Egypt: these that Moses and Aaron.

chapters.zh: 当耶和华在埃及地对摩西说话的日子，
chapters.en: And it came to pass on the day the LORD spake unto Moses in the land of Egypt,

chapters.zh: 他向摩西说：我是耶和华；我对你说的一切话，你都要告诉埃及王法老。
chapters.en: That the LORD spake unto Moses, saying, I the LORD: speak thou unto Pharaoh king of Egypt all that I say unto thee.

chapters.zh: 摩西在耶和华面前说：看哪，我是拙口笨舌的人，法老怎肯听我呢？
chapters.en: And Moses said before the LORD, Behold, I of uncircumcised lips, and how shall Pharaoh hearken unto me?

chapters.zh: 耶和华对摩西说：我使你在法老面前代替神，你的哥哥亚伦是替你说话的。
chapters.en: And the LORD said unto Moses, See, I have made thee a god to Pharaoh: and Aaron thy brother shall be thy prophet.

chapters.zh: 凡我所吩咐你的，你都要说。你的哥哥亚伦要对法老说，容以色列人出他的地。
chapters.en: Thou shalt speak all that I command thee: and Aaron thy brother shall speak unto Pharaoh, that he send the children of Israel out of his land.

chapters.zh: 我要使法老的心刚硬，也要在埃及地多行神迹奇事。
chapters.en: And I will harden Pharaoh's heart, and multiply my signs and my wonders in the land of Egypt.

chapters.zh: 但法老必不听你们；我要伸手重重的刑罚埃及，将我的军队以色列民从埃及地领出来。
chapters.en: But Pharaoh shall not hearken unto you, that I may lay my hand upon Egypt, and bring forth mine armies, my people the children of Israel, out of the land of Egypt by great judgments.

chapters.zh: 我伸手攻击埃及，将以色列人从他们中间领出来的时候，埃及人就要知道我是耶和华。
chapters.en: And the Egyptians shall know that I the LORD, when I stretch forth mine hand upon Egypt, and bring out the children of Israel from among them.

chapters.zh: 摩西、亚伦这样行；耶和华怎样吩咐他们，他们就照样行了。
chapters.en: And Moses and Aaron did as the LORD commanded them, so did they.

chapters.zh: 摩西、亚伦与法老说话的时候，摩西八十岁，亚伦八十三岁。
chapters.en: And Moses fourscore years old, and Aaron fourscore and three years old, when they spake unto Pharaoh.

chapters.zh: 耶和华晓谕摩西、亚伦说：
chapters.en: And the LORD spake unto Moses and unto Aaron, saying,

chapters.zh: 法老若对你们说：你们行件奇事罢！你就吩咐亚伦说：把杖丢在法老面前，使杖变作蛇。
chapters.en: When Pharaoh shall speak unto you, saying, Shew a miracle for you: then thou shalt say unto Aaron, Take thy rod, and cast before Pharaoh, it shall become a serpent.

chapters.zh: 摩西、亚伦进去见法老，就照耶和华所吩咐的行。亚伦把杖丢在法老和臣仆面前，杖就变作蛇。
chapters.en: And Moses and Aaron went in unto Pharaoh, and they did so as the LORD had commanded: and Aaron cast down his rod before Pharaoh, and before his servants, and it became a serpent.

chapters.zh: 于是法老召了博士和术士来；他们是埃及行法术的，也用邪术照样而行。
chapters.en: Then Pharaoh also called the wise men and the sorcerers: now the magicians of Egypt, they also did in like manner with their enchantments.

chapters.zh: 他们各人丢下自己的杖，杖就变作蛇；但亚伦的杖吞了他们的杖。
chapters.en: For they cast down every man his rod, and they became serpents: but Aaron's rod swallowed up their rods.

chapters.zh: 法老心里刚硬，不肯听从摩西、亚伦，正如耶和华所说的。
chapters.en: And he hardened Pharaoh's heart, that he hearkened not unto them; as the LORD had said.

chapters.zh: 耶和华对摩西说：法老心里固执，不肯容百姓去。
chapters.en: And the LORD said unto Moses, Pharaoh's heart hardened, he refuseth to let the people go.

chapters.zh: 明日早晨，他出来往水边去，你要往河边迎接他，手里要拿著那变过蛇的杖，
chapters.en: Get thee unto Pharaoh in the morning; lo, he goeth out unto the water; and thou shalt stand by the river's brink against he come; and the rod which was turned to a serpent shalt thou take in thine hand.

chapters.zh: 对他说：耶和华 ─ 希伯来人的神打发我来见你，说：容我的百姓去，好在旷野事奉我。到如今你还是不听。
chapters.en: And thou shalt say unto him, The LORD God of the Hebrews hath sent me unto thee, saying, Let my people go, that they may serve me in the wilderness: and, behold, hitherto thou wouldest not hear.

chapters.zh: 耶和华这样说：我要用我手里的杖击打河中的水，水就变作血；因此，你必知道我是耶和华。
chapters.en: Thus saith the LORD, In this thou shalt know that I the LORD: behold, I will smite with the rod that in mine hand upon the waters which in the river, and they shall be turned to blood.

chapters.zh: 河里的鱼必死，河也要腥臭，埃及人就要厌恶吃这河里的水。
chapters.en: And the fish that in the river shall die, and the river shall stink; and the Egyptians shall lothe to drink of the water of the river.

chapters.zh: 耶和华晓谕摩西说：你对亚伦说：把你的杖伸在埃及所有的水以上，就是在他们的江、河、池、塘以上，叫水都变作血。在埃及遍地，无论在木器中，石器中，都必有血。
chapters.en: And the LORD spake unto Moses, Say unto Aaron, Take thy rod, and stretch out thine hand upon the waters of Egypt, upon their streams, upon their rivers, and upon their ponds, and upon all their pools of water, that they may become blood; and there may be blood throughout all the land of Egypt, both in wood, and in stone.

chapters.zh: 摩西、亚伦就照耶和华所吩咐的行。亚伦在法老和臣仆眼前举杖击打河里的水，河里的水都变作血了。
chapters.en: And Moses and Aaron did so, as the LORD commanded; and he lifted up the rod, and smote the waters that in the river, in the sight of Pharaoh, and in the sight of his servants; and all the waters that in the river were turned to blood.

chapters.zh: 河里的鱼死了，河也腥臭了，埃及人就不能吃这河里的水；埃及遍地都有了血。
chapters.en: And the fish that in the river died; and the river stank, and the Egyptians could not drink of the water of the river; and there was blood throughout all the land of Egypt.

chapters.zh: 埃及行法术的，也用邪术照样而行。法老心里刚硬，不肯听摩西、亚伦，正如耶和华所说的。
chapters.en: And the magicians of Egypt did so with their enchantments: and Pharaoh's heart was hardened, neither did he hearken unto them; as the LORD had said.

chapters.zh: 法老转身进宫，也不把这事放在心上。
chapters.en: And Pharaoh turned and went into his house, neither did he set his heart to this also.

chapters.zh: 埃及人都在河的两边挖地，要得水喝，因为他们不能喝这河里的水。
chapters.en: And all the Egyptians digged round about the river for water to drink; for they could not drink of the water of the river.

chapters.zh: 耶和华击打河以后满了七天。
chapters.en: And seven days were fulfilled, after that the LORD had smitten the river.

chapters.zh: 耶和华吩咐摩西说：你进去见法老，对他说：耶和华这样说：容我的百姓去，好事奉我。
chapters.en: And the LORD spake unto Moses, Go unto Pharaoh, and say unto him, Thus saith the LORD, Let my people go, that they may serve me.

chapters.zh: 你若不肯容他们去，我必使青蛙蹧蹋你的四境。
chapters.en: And if thou refuse to let go, behold, I will smite all thy borders with frogs:

chapters.zh: 河里要滋生青蛙；这青蛙要上来进你的宫殿和你的卧房，上你的床榻，进你臣仆的房屋，上你百姓的身上，进你的炉灶和你的抟面盆，
chapters.en: And the river shall bring forth frogs abundantly, which shall go up and come into thine house, and into thy bedchamber, and upon thy bed, and into the house of thy servants, and upon thy people, and into thine ovens, and into thy kneadingtroughs:

chapters.zh: 又要上你和你百姓并你众臣仆的身上。
chapters.en: And the frogs shall come up both on thee, and upon thy people, and upon all thy servants.

chapters.zh: 耶和华晓谕摩西说：你对亚伦说：把你的杖伸在江、河、池以上，使青蛙到埃及地上来。
chapters.en: And the LORD spake unto Moses, Say unto Aaron, Stretch forth thine hand with thy rod over the streams, over the rivers, and over the ponds, and cause frogs to come up upon the land of Egypt.

chapters.zh: 亚伦便伸杖在埃及的诸水以上，青蛙就上来，遮满了埃及地。
chapters.en: And Aaron stretched out his hand over the waters of Egypt; and the frogs came up, and covered the land of Egypt.

chapters.zh: 行法术的也用他们的邪术照样而行，叫青蛙上了埃及地。
chapters.en: And the magicians did so with their enchantments, and brought up frogs upon the land of Egypt.

chapters.zh: 法老召了摩西、亚伦来，说：请你们求耶和华使这青蛙离开我和我的民，我就容百姓去祭祀耶和华。
chapters.en: Then Pharaoh called for Moses and Aaron, and said, Intreat the LORD, that he may take away the frogs from me, and from my people; and I will let the people go, that they may do sacrifice unto the LORD.

chapters.zh: 摩西对法老说：任凭你罢，我要何时为你和你的臣仆并你的百姓祈求，除灭青蛙离开你和你的宫殿只留在河里呢？
chapters.en: And Moses said unto Pharaoh, Glory over me: when shall I intreat for thee, and for thy servants, and for thy people, to destroy the frogs from thee and thy houses, they may remain in the river only?

chapters.zh: 他说：明天。摩西说：可以照你的话罢，好叫你知道没有像耶和华 ─ 我们神的。
chapters.en: And he said, To morrow. And he said, according to thy word: that thou mayest know that none like unto the LORD our God.

chapters.zh: 青蛙要离开你和你的宫殿，并你的臣仆与你的百姓，只留在河里。
chapters.en: And the frogs shall depart from thee, and from thy houses, and from thy servants, and from thy people; they shall remain in the river only.

chapters.zh: 于是摩西、亚伦离开法老出去。摩西为扰害法老的青蛙呼求耶和华。
chapters.en: And Moses and Aaron went out from Pharaoh: and Moses cried unto the LORD because of the frogs which he had brought against Pharaoh.

chapters.zh: 耶和华就照摩西的话行。凡在房里、院中、田间的青蛙都死了。
chapters.en: And the LORD did according to the word of Moses; and the frogs died out of the houses, out of the villages, and out of the fields.

chapters.zh: 众人把青蛙聚拢成堆，遍地就都腥臭。
chapters.en: And they gathered them together upon heaps: and the land stank.

chapters.zh: 但法老见灾祸松缓，就硬著心，不肯听他们，正如耶和华所说的。
chapters.en: But when Pharaoh saw that there was respite, he hardened his heart, and hearkened not unto them; as the LORD had said.

chapters.zh: 耶和华吩咐摩西说：你对亚伦说：伸出你的杖击打地上的尘土，使尘土在埃及遍地变作虱子（或译：虼蚤；下同）。
chapters.en: And the LORD said unto Moses, Say unto Aaron, Stretch out thy rod, and smite the dust of the land, that it may become lice throughout all the land of Egypt.

chapters.zh: 他们就这样行。亚伦伸杖击打地上的尘土，就在人身上和牲畜身上有了虱子；埃及遍地的尘土都变成虱子了。
chapters.en: And they did so; for Aaron stretched out his hand with his rod, and smote the dust of the earth, and it became lice in man, and in beast; all the dust of the land became lice throughout all the land of Egypt.

chapters.zh: 行法术的也用邪术要生出虱子来，却是不能。于是在人身上和牲畜身上都有了虱子。
chapters.en: And the magicians did so with their enchantments to bring forth lice, but they could not: so there were lice upon man, and upon beast.

chapters.zh: 行法术的就对法老说：这是神的手段。法老心里刚硬，不肯听摩西、亚伦，正如耶和华所说的。
chapters.en: Then the magicians said unto Pharaoh, This the finger of God: and Pharaoh's heart was hardened, and he hearkened not unto them; as the LORD had said.

chapters.zh: 耶和华对摩西说：你清早起来，法老来到水边，你站在他面前，对他说：耶和华这样说：容我的百姓去，好事奉我。
chapters.en: And the LORD said unto Moses, Rise up early in the morning, and stand before Pharaoh; lo, he cometh forth to the water; and say unto him, Thus saith the LORD, Let my people go, that they may serve me.

chapters.zh: 你若不容我的百姓去，我要叫成群的苍蝇到你和你臣仆并你百姓的身上，进你的房屋，并且埃及人的房屋和他们所住的地都要满了成群的苍蝇。
chapters.en: Else, if thou wilt not let my people go, behold, I will send swarms upon thee, and upon thy servants, and upon thy people, and into thy houses: and the houses of the Egyptians shall be full of swarms , and also the ground whereon they .

chapters.zh: 当那日，我必分别我百姓所住的歌珊地，使那里没有成群的苍蝇，好叫你知道我是天下的耶和华。
chapters.en: And I will sever in that day the land of Goshen, in which my people dwell, that no swarms shall be there; to the end thou mayest know that I the LORD in the midst of the earth.

chapters.zh: 我要将我的百姓和你的百姓分别出来。明天必有这神迹。
chapters.en: And I will put a division between my people and thy people: to morrow shall this sign be.

chapters.zh: 耶和华就这样行。苍蝇成了大群，进入法老的宫殿，和他臣仆的房屋；埃及遍地就因这成群的苍蝇败坏了。
chapters.en: And the LORD did so; and there came a grievous swarm into the house of Pharaoh, and his servants' houses, and into all the land of Egypt: the land was corrupted by reason of the swarm .

chapters.zh: 法老召了摩西、亚伦来，说：你们去，在这地祭祀你们的神罢！
chapters.en: And Pharaoh called for Moses and for Aaron, and said, Go ye, sacrifice to your God in the land.

chapters.zh: 摩西说：这样行本不相宜，因为我们要把埃及人所厌恶的祭祀耶和华 ─ 我们的神；若把埃及人所厌恶的在他们眼前献为祭，他们岂不拿石头打死我们么？
chapters.en: And Moses said, It is not meet so to do; for we shall sacrifice the abomination of the Egyptians to the LORD our God: lo, shall we sacrifice the abomination of the Egyptians before their eyes, and will they not stone us?

chapters.zh: 我们要往旷野去，走三天的路程，照著耶和华 ─ 我们神所要吩咐我们的祭祀他。
chapters.en: We will go three days' journey into the wilderness, and sacrifice to the LORD our God, as he shall command us.

chapters.zh: 法老说：我容你们去，在旷野祭祀耶和华 ─ 你们的神；只是不要走得很远。求你们为我祈祷。
chapters.en: And Pharaoh said, I will let you go, that ye may sacrifice to the LORD your God in the wilderness; only ye shall not go very far away: intreat for me.

chapters.zh: 摩西说：我要出去求耶和华，使成群的苍蝇明天离开法老和法老的臣仆并法老的百姓；法老却不可再行诡诈，不容百姓去祭祀耶和华。
chapters.en: And Moses said, Behold, I go out from thee, and I will intreat the LORD that the swarms may depart from Pharaoh, from his servants, and from his people, to morrow: but let not Pharaoh deal deceitfully any more in not letting the people go to sacrifice to the LORD.

chapters.zh: 于是摩西离开法老去求耶和华。
chapters.en: And Moses went out from Pharaoh, and intreated the LORD.

chapters.zh: 耶和华就照摩西的话行，叫成群的苍蝇离开法老和他的臣仆并他的百姓，一个也没有留下。
chapters.en: And the LORD did according to the word of Moses; and he removed the swarms from Pharaoh, from his servants, and from his people; there remained not one.

chapters.zh: 这一次法老又硬著心，不容百姓去。
chapters.en: And Pharaoh hardened his heart at this time also, neither would he let the people go.

chapters.zh: 耶和华吩咐摩西说：你进去见法老，对他说：耶和华 ─ 希伯来人的神这样说：容我的百姓去，好事奉我。
chapters.en: Then the LORD said unto Moses, Go in unto Pharaoh, and tell him, Thus saith the LORD God of the Hebrews, Let my people go, that they may serve me.

chapters.zh: 你若不肯容他们去，仍旧强留他们，
chapters.en: For if thou refuse to let go, and wilt hold them still,

chapters.zh: 耶和华的手加在你田间的牲畜上，就是在马、驴、骆驼、牛群、羊群上，必有重重的瘟疫。
chapters.en: Behold, the hand of the LORD is upon thy cattle which in the field, upon the horses, upon the asses, upon the camels, upon the oxen, and upon the sheep: a very grievous murrain.

chapters.zh: 耶和华要分别以色列的牲畜和埃及的牲畜，凡属以色列人的，一样都不死。
chapters.en: And the LORD shall sever between the cattle of Israel and the cattle of Egypt: and there shall nothing die of all the children's of Israel.

chapters.zh: 耶和华就定了时候，说：明天耶和华必在此地行这事。
chapters.en: And the LORD appointed a set time, saying, To morrow the LORD shall do this thing in the land.

chapters.zh: 第二天，耶和华就行这事。埃及的牲畜几乎都死了，只是以色列人的牲畜，一个都没有死。
chapters.en: And the LORD did that thing on the morrow, and all the cattle of Egypt died: but of the cattle of the children of Israel died not one.

chapters.zh: 法老打发人去看，谁知以色列人的牲畜连一个都没有死。法老的心却是固执，不容百姓去。
chapters.en: And Pharaoh sent, and, behold, there was not one of the cattle of the Israelites dead. And the heart of Pharaoh was hardened, and he did not let the people go.

chapters.zh: 耶和华吩咐摩西、亚伦说：你们取几捧炉灰，摩西要在法老面前向天扬起来。
chapters.en: And the LORD said unto Moses and unto Aaron, Take to you handfuls of ashes of the furnace, and let Moses sprinkle it toward the heaven in the sight of Pharaoh.

chapters.zh: 这灰要在埃及全地变作尘土，在人身上和牲畜身上成了起泡的疮。
chapters.en: And it shall become small dust in all the land of Egypt, and shall be a boil breaking forth blains upon man, and upon beast, throughout all the land of Egypt.

chapters.zh: 摩西、亚伦取了炉灰，站在法老面前。摩西向天扬起来，就在人身上和牲畜身上成了起泡的疮。
chapters.en: And they took ashes of the furnace, and stood before Pharaoh; and Moses sprinkled it up toward heaven; and it became a boil breaking forth blains upon man, and upon beast.

chapters.zh: 行法术的在摩西面前站立不住，因为在他们身上和一切埃及人身上都有这疮。
chapters.en: And the magicians could not stand before Moses because of the boils; for the boil was upon the magicians, and upon all the Egyptians.

chapters.zh: 耶和华使法老的心刚硬，不听他们，正如耶和华对摩西所说的。
chapters.en: And the LORD hardened the heart of Pharaoh, and he hearkened not unto them; as the LORD had spoken unto Moses.

chapters.zh: 耶和华对摩西说：你清早起来，站在法老面前，对他说：耶和华 ─ 希伯来人的神这样说：容我的百姓去，好事奉我。
chapters.en: And the LORD said unto Moses, Rise up early in the morning, and stand before Pharaoh, and say unto him, Thus saith the LORD God of the Hebrews, Let my people go, that they may serve me.

chapters.zh: 因为这一次我要叫一切的灾殃临到你和你臣仆并你百姓的身上，叫你知道在普天下没有像我的。
chapters.en: For I will at this time send all my plagues upon thine heart, and upon thy servants, and upon thy people; that thou mayest know that none like me in all the earth.

chapters.zh: 我若伸手用瘟疫攻击你和你的百姓，你早就从地上除灭了。
chapters.en: For now I will stretch out my hand, that I may smite thee and thy people with pestilence; and thou shalt be cut off from the earth.

chapters.zh: 其实，我叫你存立，是特要向你显我的大能，并要使我的名传遍天下。
chapters.en: And in very deed for this have I raised thee up, for to shew thee my power; and that my name may be declared throughout all the earth.

chapters.zh: 你还向我的百姓自高，不容他们去么？
chapters.en: As yet exaltest thou thyself against my people, that thou wilt not let them go?

chapters.zh: 到明天约在这时候，我必叫重大的冰雹降下，自从埃及开国以来，没有这样的冰雹。
chapters.en: Behold, to morrow about this time I will cause it to rain a very grievous hail, such as hath not been in Egypt since the foundation thereof even until now.

chapters.zh: 现在你要打发人把你的牲畜和你田间一切所有的催进来；凡在田间不收回家的，无论是人是牲畜，冰雹必降在他们身上，他们就必死。
chapters.en: Send therefore now, gather thy cattle, and all that thou hast in the field; every man and beast which shall be found in the field, and shall not be brought home, the hail shall come down upon them, and they shall die.

chapters.zh: 法老的臣仆中，惧怕耶和华这话的，便叫他的奴仆和牲畜跑进家来。
chapters.en: He that feared the word of the LORD among the servants of Pharaoh made his servants and his cattle flee into the houses:

chapters.zh: 但那不把耶和华这话放在心上的，就将他的奴仆和牲畜留在田里。
chapters.en: And he that regarded not the word of the LORD left his servants and his cattle in the field.

chapters.zh: 耶和华对摩西说：你向天伸杖，使埃及遍地的人身上和牲畜身上，并田间各样菜蔬上，都有冰雹。
chapters.en: And the LORD said unto Moses, Stretch forth thine hand toward heaven, that there may be hail in all the land of Egypt, upon man, and upon beast, and upon every herb of the field, throughout the land of Egypt.

chapters.zh: 摩西向天伸杖，耶和华就打雷下雹，有火闪到地上；耶和华下雹在埃及地上。
chapters.en: And Moses stretched forth his rod toward heaven: and the LORD sent thunder and hail, and the fire ran along upon the ground; and the LORD rained hail upon the land of Egypt.

chapters.zh: 那时，雹与火搀杂，甚是利害，自从埃及成国以来，遍地没有这样的。
chapters.en: So there was hail, and fire mingled with the hail, very grievous, such as there was none like it in all the land of Egypt since it became a nation.

chapters.zh: 在埃及遍地，雹击打了田间所有的人和牲畜，并一切的菜蔬，又打坏田间一切的树木。
chapters.en: And the hail smote throughout all the land of Egypt all that in the field, both man and beast; and the hail smote every herb of the field, and brake every tree of the field.

chapters.zh: 惟独以色列人所住的歌珊地没有冰雹。
chapters.en: Only in the land of Goshen, where the children of Israel , was there no hail.

chapters.zh: 法老打发人召摩西、亚伦来，对他们说：这一次我犯了罪了。耶和华是公义的；我和我的百姓是邪恶的。
chapters.en: And Pharaoh sent, and called for Moses and Aaron, and said unto them, I have sinned this time: the LORD righteous, and I and my people wicked.

chapters.zh: 这雷轰和冰雹已经够了。请你们求耶和华，我就容你们去，不再留住你们。
chapters.en: Intreat the LORD (for enough) that there be no mighty thunderings and hail; and I will let you go, and ye shall stay no longer.

chapters.zh: 摩西对他说：我一出城，就要向耶和华举手祷告；雷必止住，也不再有冰雹，叫你知道全地都是属耶和华的。
chapters.en: And Moses said unto him, As soon as I am gone out of the city, I will spread abroad my hands unto the LORD; the thunder shall cease, neither shall there be any more hail; that thou mayest know how that the earth the LORD'S.

chapters.zh: 至于你和你的臣仆，我知道你们还是不惧怕耶和华神。
chapters.en: But as for thee and thy servants, I know that ye will not yet fear the LORD God.

chapters.zh: 那时，麻和大麦被雹击打；因为大麦已经吐穗，麻也开了花。
chapters.en: And the flax and the barley was smitten: for the barley in the ear, and the flax bolled.

chapters.zh: 只是小麦和粗麦没有被击打，因为还没有长成。）
chapters.en: But the wheat and the rie were not smitten: for they not grown up.

chapters.zh: 摩西离了法老出城，向耶和华举手祷告；雷和雹就止住，雨也不再浇在地上了。
chapters.en: And Moses went out of the city from Pharaoh, and spread abroad his hands unto the LORD: and the thunders and hail ceased, and the rain was not poured upon the earth.

chapters.zh: 法老见雨和雹与雷止住，就越发犯罪；他和他的臣仆都硬著心。
chapters.en: And when Pharaoh saw that the rain and the hail and the thunders were ceased, he sinned yet more, and hardened his heart, he and his servants.

chapters.zh: 法老的心刚硬，不容以色列人去，正如耶和华藉著摩西所说的。
chapters.en: And the heart of Pharaoh was hardened, neither would he let the children of Israel go; as the LORD had spoken by Moses.

chapters.zh: 耶和华对摩西说：你进去见法老。我使他和他臣仆的心刚硬，为要在他们中间显我这些神迹，
chapters.en: And the LORD said unto Moses, Go in unto Pharaoh: for I have hardened his heart, and the heart of his servants, that I might shew these my signs before him:

chapters.zh: 并要叫你将我向埃及人所做的事，和在他们中间所行的神迹，传于你儿子和你孙子的耳中，好叫你们知道我是耶和华。
chapters.en: And that thou mayest tell in the ears of thy son, and of thy son's son, what things I have wrought in Egypt, and my signs which I have done among them; that ye may know how that I the LORD.

chapters.zh: 摩西、亚伦就进去见法老，对他说：耶和华 ─ 希伯来人的神这样说：你在我面前不肯自卑要到几时呢？容我的百姓去，好事奉我。
chapters.en: And Moses and Aaron came in unto Pharaoh, and said unto him, Thus saith the LORD God of the Hebrews, How long wilt thou refuse to humble thyself before me? let my people go, that they may serve me.

chapters.zh: 你若不肯容我的百姓去，明天我要使蝗虫进入你的境内，
chapters.en: Else, if thou refuse to let my people go, behold, to morrow will I bring the locusts into thy coast:

chapters.zh: 遮满地面，甚至看不见地，并且吃那冰雹所剩的和田间所长的一切树木。
chapters.en: And they shall cover the face of the earth, that one cannot be able to see the earth: and they shall eat the residue of that which is escaped, which remaineth unto you from the hail, and shall eat every tree which groweth for you out of the field:

chapters.zh: 你的宫殿和你众臣仆的房屋，并一切埃及人的房屋，都要被蝗虫占满了；自从你祖宗和你祖宗的祖宗在世以来，直到今日，没有见过这样的灾。摩西就转身离开法老出去。
chapters.en: And they shall fill thy houses, and the houses of all thy servants, and the houses of all the Egyptians; which neither thy fathers, nor thy fathers' fathers have seen, since the day that they were upon the earth unto this day. And he turned himself, and went out from Pharaoh.

chapters.zh: 法老的臣仆对法老说：这人为我们的网罗要到几时呢？容这些人去事奉耶和华 ─ 他们的神罢！埃及已经败坏了，你还不知道么？
chapters.en: And Pharaoh's servants said unto him, How long shall this man be a snare unto us? let the men go, that they may serve the LORD their God: knowest thou not yet that Egypt is destroyed?

chapters.zh: 于是摩西、亚伦被召回来见法老；法老对他们说：你们去事奉耶和华 ─ 你们的神；但那要去的是谁呢？
chapters.en: And Moses and Aaron were brought again unto Pharaoh: and he said unto them, Go, serve the LORD your God: who they that shall go?

chapters.zh: 摩西说：我们要和我们老的少的、儿子女儿同去，且把羊群牛群一同带去，因为我们务要向耶和华守节。
chapters.en: And Moses said, We will go with our young and with our old, with our sons and with our daughters, with our flocks and with our herds will we go; for we a feast unto the LORD.

chapters.zh: 法老对他们说：我容你们和你们妇人孩子去的时候，耶和华与你们同在罢！你们要谨慎；因为有祸在你们眼前（或作：你们存著恶意），
chapters.en: And he said unto them, Let the LORD be so with you, as I will let you go, and your little ones: look ; for evil before you.

chapters.zh: 不可都去！你们这壮年人去事奉耶和华罢，因为这是你们所求的。于是把他们从法老面前撵出去。
chapters.en: Not so: go now ye men, and serve the LORD; for that ye did desire. And they were driven out from Pharaoh's presence.

chapters.zh: 耶和华对摩西说：你向埃及地伸杖，使蝗虫到埃及地上来，吃地上一切的菜蔬，就是冰雹所剩的。
chapters.en: And the LORD said unto Moses, Stretch out thine hand over the land of Egypt for the locusts, that they may come up upon the land of Egypt, and eat every herb of the land, all that the hail hath left.

chapters.zh: 摩西就向埃及地伸杖，那一昼一夜，耶和华使东风刮在埃及地上；到了早晨，东风把蝗虫刮了来。
chapters.en: And Moses stretched forth his rod over the land of Egypt, and the LORD brought an east wind upon the land all that day, and all night; when it was morning, the east wind brought the locusts.

chapters.zh: 蝗虫上来，落在埃及的四境，甚是厉害；以前没有这样的，以后也必没有。
chapters.en: And the locusts went up over all the land of Egypt, and rested in all the coasts of Egypt: very grievous ; before them there were no such locusts as they, neither after them shall be such.

chapters.zh: 因为这蝗虫遮满地面，甚至地都黑暗了，又吃地上一切的菜蔬和冰雹所剩树上的果子。埃及遍地，无论是树木，是田间的菜蔬，连一点青的也没有留下。
chapters.en: For they covered the face of the whole earth, so that the land was darkened; and they did eat every herb of the land, and all the fruit of the trees which the hail had left: and there remained not any green thing in the trees, or in the herbs of the field, through all the land of Egypt.

chapters.zh: 于是法老急忙召了摩西、亚伦来，说：我得罪耶和华 ─ 你们的神，又得罪了你们。
chapters.en: Then Pharaoh called for Moses and Aaron in haste; and he said, I have sinned against the LORD your God, and against you.

chapters.zh: 现在求你，只这一次，饶恕我的罪，求耶和华 ─ 你们的神使我脱离这一次的死亡。
chapters.en: Now therefore forgive, I pray thee, my sin only this once, and intreat the LORD your God, that he may take away from me this death only.

chapters.zh: 摩西就离开法老去求耶和华。
chapters.en: And he went out from Pharaoh, and intreated the LORD.

chapters.zh: 耶和华转了极大的西风，把蝗虫刮起，吹入红海；在埃及的四境连一个也没有留下。
chapters.en: And the LORD turned a mighty strong west wind, which took away the locusts, and cast them into the Red sea; there remained not one locust in all the coasts of Egypt.

chapters.zh: 但耶和华使法老的心刚硬，不容以色列人去。
chapters.en: But the LORD hardened Pharaoh's heart, so that he would not let the children of Israel go.

chapters.zh: 耶和华对摩西说：你向天伸杖，使埃及地黑暗；这黑暗似乎摸得著。
chapters.en: And the LORD said unto Moses, Stretch out thine hand toward heaven, that there may be darkness over the land of Egypt, even darkness may be felt.

chapters.zh: 摩西向天伸杖，埃及遍地就乌黑了三天。
chapters.en: And Moses stretched forth his hand toward heaven; and there was a thick darkness in all the land of Egypt three days:

chapters.zh: 三天之久，人不能相见，谁也不敢起来离开本处；惟有以色列人家中都有亮光。
chapters.en: They saw not one another, neither rose any from his place for three days: but all the children of Israel had light in their dwellings.

chapters.zh: 法老就召摩西来，说：你们去事奉耶和华；只是你们的羊群牛群要留下；你们的妇人孩子可以和你们同去。
chapters.en: And Pharaoh called unto Moses, and said, Go ye, serve the LORD; only let your flocks and your herds be stayed: let your little ones also go with you.

chapters.zh: 摩西说：你总要把祭物和燔祭牲交给我们，使我们可以祭祀耶和华 ─ 我们的神。
chapters.en: And Moses said, Thou must give us also sacrifices and burnt offerings, that we may sacrifice unto the LORD our God.

chapters.zh: 我们的牲畜也要带去，连一蹄也不留下；因为我们要从其中取出来，事奉耶和华 ─ 我们的神。我们未到那里，还不知道用甚么事奉耶和华。
chapters.en: Our cattle also shall go with us; there shall not an hoof be left behind; for thereof must we take to serve the LORD our God; and we know not with what we must serve the LORD, until we come thither.

chapters.zh: 但耶和华使法老的心刚硬，不肯容他们去。
chapters.en: But the LORD hardened Pharaoh's heart, and he would not let them go.

chapters.zh: 法老对摩西说：你离开我去罢，你要小心，不要再见我的面！因为你见我面的那日你就必死！
chapters.en: And Pharaoh said unto him, Get thee from me, take heed to thyself, see my face no more; for in day thou seest my face thou shalt die.

chapters.zh: 摩西说：你说得好！我必不再见你的面了。
chapters.en: And Moses said, Thou hast spoken well, I will see thy face again no more.

chapters.zh: 耶和华对摩西说：我再使一样的灾殃临到法老和埃及，然后他必容你们离开这地。他容你们去的时候，总要催逼你们都从这地出去。
chapters.en: And the LORD said unto Moses, Yet will I bring one plague upon Pharaoh, and upon Egypt; afterwards he will let you go hence: when he shall let go, he shall surely thrust you out hence altogether.

chapters.zh: 你要传于百姓的耳中，叫他们男女各人向邻舍要金器银器。
chapters.en: Speak now in the ears of the people, and let every man borrow of his neighbour, and every woman of her neighbour, jewels of silver, and jewels of gold.

chapters.zh: 耶和华叫百姓在埃及人眼前蒙恩，并且摩西在埃及地、法老臣仆，和百姓的眼中看为极大。
chapters.en: And the LORD gave the people favour in the sight of the Egyptians. Moreover the man Moses very great in the land of Egypt, in the sight of Pharaoh's servants, and in the sight of the people.

chapters.zh: 摩西说：耶和华这样说：约到半夜，我必出去巡行埃及遍地。
chapters.en: And Moses said, Thus saith the LORD, About midnight will I go out into the midst of Egypt:

chapters.zh: 凡在埃及地，从坐宝座的法老直到磨子后的婢女所有的长子，以及一切头生的牲畜，都必死。
chapters.en: And all the firstborn in the land of Egypt shall die, from the firstborn of Pharaoh that sitteth upon his throne, even unto the firstborn of the maidservant that behind the mill; and all the firstborn of beasts.

chapters.zh: 埃及遍地必有大哀号；从前没有这样的，后来也必没有。
chapters.en: And there shall be a great cry throughout all the land of Egypt, such as there was none like it, nor shall be like it any more.

chapters.zh: 至于以色列中，无论是人是牲畜，连狗也不敢向他们摇舌，好叫你们知道耶和华是将埃及人和以色列人分别出来。
chapters.en: But against any of the children of Israel shall not a dog move his tongue, against man or beast: that ye may know how that the LORD doth put a difference between the Egyptians and Israel.

chapters.zh: 你这一切臣仆都要俯伏来见我，说：求你和跟从你的百姓都出去，然后我要出去。于是，摩西气忿忿的离开法老，出去了。
chapters.en: And all these thy servants shall come down unto me, and bow down themselves unto me, saying, Get thee out, and all the people that follow thee: and after that I will go out. And he went out from Pharaoh in a great anger.

chapters.zh: 耶和华对摩西说：法老必不听你们，使我的奇事在埃及地多起来。
chapters.en: And the LORD said unto Moses, Pharaoh shall not hearken unto you; that my wonders may be multiplied in the land of Egypt.

chapters.zh: 摩西、亚伦在法老面前行了这一切奇事；耶和华使法老的心刚硬，不容以色列人出离他的地。
chapters.en: And Moses and Aaron did all these wonders before Pharaoh: and the LORD hardened Pharaoh's heart, so that he would not let the children of Israel go out of his land.

chapters.zh: 耶和华在埃及地晓谕摩西、亚伦说：
chapters.en: And the LORD spake unto Moses and Aaron in the land of Egypt, saying,

chapters.zh: 你们要以本月为正月，为一年之首。
chapters.en: This month unto you the beginning of months: it the first month of the year to you.

chapters.zh: 你们吩咐以色列全会众说：本月初十日，各人要按著父家取羊羔，一家一只。
chapters.en: Speak ye unto all the congregation of Israel, saying, In the tenth of this month they shall take to them every man a lamb, according to the house of fathers, a lamb for an house:

chapters.zh: 若是一家的人太少，吃不了一只羊羔，本人就要和他隔壁的邻舍共取一只。你们预备羊羔，要按著人数和饭量计算。
chapters.en: And if the household be too little for the lamb, let him and his neighbour next unto his house take according to the number of the souls; every man according to his eating shall make your count for the lamb.

chapters.zh: 要无残疾、一岁的公羊羔，你们或从绵羊里取，或从山羊里取，都可以。
chapters.en: Your lamb shall be without blemish, a male of the first year: ye shall take out from the sheep, or from the goats:

chapters.zh: 要留到本月十四日，在黄昏的时候，以色列全会众把羊羔宰了。
chapters.en: And ye shall keep it up until the fourteenth day of the same month: and the whole assembly of the congregation of Israel shall kill it in the evening.

chapters.zh: 各家要取点血，涂在吃羊羔的房屋左右的门框上和门楣上。
chapters.en: And they shall take of the blood, and strike on the two side posts and on the upper door post of the houses, wherein they shall eat it.

chapters.zh: 当夜要吃羊羔的肉；用火烤了，与无酵饼和苦菜同吃。
chapters.en: And they shall eat the flesh in that night, roast with fire, and unleavened bread; with bitter they shall eat it.

chapters.zh: 不可吃生的，断不可吃水煮的，要带著头、腿、五脏，用火烤了吃。
chapters.en: Eat not of it raw, nor sodden at all with water, but roast fire; his head with his legs, and with the purtenance thereof.

chapters.zh: 不可剩下一点留到早晨；若留到早晨，要用火烧了。
chapters.en: And ye shall let nothing of it remain until the morning; and that which remaineth of it until the morning ye shall burn with fire.

chapters.zh: 你们吃羊羔当腰间束带，脚上穿鞋，手中拿杖，赶紧的吃；这是耶和华的逾越节。
chapters.en: And thus shall ye eat it; your loins girded, your shoes on your feet, and your staff in your hand; and ye shall eat it in haste: it the LORD'S passover.

chapters.zh: 因为那夜我要巡行埃及地，把埃及地一切头生的，无论是人是牲畜，都击杀了，又要败坏埃及一切的神。我是耶和华。
chapters.en: For I will pass through the land of Egypt this night, and will smite all the firstborn in the land of Egypt, both man and beast; and against all the gods of Egypt I will execute judgment: I the LORD.

chapters.zh: 这血要在你们所住的房屋上作记号；我一见这血，就越过你们去。我击杀埃及地头生的时候，灾殃必不临到你们身上灭你们。
chapters.en: And the blood shall be to you for a token upon the houses where ye : and when I see the blood, I will pass over you, and the plague shall not be upon you to destroy , when I smite the land of Egypt.

chapters.zh: 你们要记念这日，守为耶和华的节，作为你们世世代代永远的定例。
chapters.en: And this day shall be unto you for a memorial; and ye shall keep it a feast to the LORD throughout your generations; ye shall keep it a feast by an ordinance for ever.

chapters.zh: 你们要吃无酵饼七日。头一日要把酵从你们各家中除去；因为从头一日起，到第七日为止，凡吃有酵之饼的，必从以色列中剪除。
chapters.en: Seven days shall ye eat unleavened bread; even the first day ye shall put away leaven out of your houses: for whosoever eateth leavened bread from the first day until the seventh day, that soul shall be cut off from Israel.

chapters.zh: 头一日你们当有圣会，第七日也当有圣会。这两日之内，除了预备各人所要吃的以外，无论何工都不可做。
chapters.en: And in the first day an holy convocation, and in the seventh day there shall be an holy convocation to you; no manner of work shall be done in them, save which every man must eat, that only may be done of you.

chapters.zh: 你们要守无酵节，因为我正当这日把你们的军队从埃及地领出来。所以，你们要守这日，作为世世代代永远的定例。
chapters.en: And ye shall observe unleavened bread; for in this selfsame day have I brought your armies out of the land of Egypt: therefore shall ye observe this day in your generations by an ordinance for ever.

chapters.zh: 从正月十四日晚上，直到二十一日晚上，你们要吃无酵饼。
chapters.en: In the first , on the fourteenth day of the month at even, ye shall eat unleavened bread, until the one and twentieth day of the month at even.

chapters.zh: 在你们各家中，七日之内不可有酵；因为凡吃有酵之物的，无论是寄居的，是本地的，必从以色列的会中剪除。
chapters.en: Seven days shall there be no leaven found in your houses: for whosoever eateth that which is leavened, even that soul shall be cut off from the congregation of Israel, whether he be a stranger, or born in the land.

chapters.zh: 有酵的物，你们都不可吃；在你们一切住处要吃无酵饼。
chapters.en: Ye shall eat nothing leavened; in all your habitations shall ye eat unleavened bread.

chapters.zh: 于是，摩西召了以色列的众长老来，对他们说：你们要按著家口取出羊羔，把这逾越节的羊羔宰了。
chapters.en: Then Moses called for all the elders of Israel, and said unto them, Draw out and take you a lamb according to your families, and kill the passover.

chapters.zh: 拿一把牛膝草，蘸盆里的血，打在门楣上和左右的门框上。你们谁也不可出自己的房门，直到早晨。
chapters.en: And ye shall take a bunch of hyssop, and dip in the blood that in the bason, and strike the lintel and the two side posts with the blood that in the bason; and none of you shall go out at the door of his house until the morning.

chapters.zh: 因为耶和华要巡行击杀埃及人，他看见血在门楣上和左右的门框上，就必越过那门，不容灭命的进你们的房屋，击杀你们。
chapters.en: For the LORD will pass through to smite the Egyptians; and when he seeth the blood upon the lintel, and on the two side posts, the LORD will pass over the door, and will not suffer the destroyer to come in unto your houses to smite .

chapters.zh: 这例，你们要守著，作为你们和你们子孙永远的定例。
chapters.en: And ye shall observe this thing for an ordinance to thee and to thy sons for ever.

chapters.zh: 日后，你们到了耶和华按著所应许赐给你们的那地，就要守这礼。
chapters.en: And it shall come to pass, when ye be come to the land which the LORD will give you, according as he hath promised, that ye shall keep this service.

chapters.zh: 你们的儿女问你们说：行这礼是甚么意思？
chapters.en: And it shall come to pass, when your children shall say unto you, What mean ye by this service?

chapters.zh: 你们就说：这是献给耶和华逾越节的祭。当以色列人在埃及的时候，他击杀埃及人，越过以色列人的房屋，救了我们各家。于是百姓低头下拜。
chapters.en: That ye shall say, It the sacrifice of the LORD'S passover, who passed over the houses of the children of Israel in Egypt, when he smote the Egyptians, and delivered our houses. And the people bowed the head and worshipped.

chapters.zh: 耶和华怎样吩咐摩西、亚伦，以色列人就怎样行。
chapters.en: And the children of Israel went away, and did as the LORD had commanded Moses and Aaron, so did they.

chapters.zh: 到了半夜，耶和华把埃及地所有的长子，就是从坐宝座的法老，直到被掳囚在监里之人的长子，以及一切头生的牲畜，尽都杀了。
chapters.en: And it came to pass, that at midnight the LORD smote all the firstborn in the land of Egypt, from the firstborn of Pharaoh that sat on his throne unto the firstborn of the captive that in the dungeon; and all the firstborn of cattle.

chapters.zh: 法老和一切臣仆，并埃及众人，夜间都起来了。在埃及有大哀号，无一家不死一个人的。
chapters.en: And Pharaoh rose up in the night, he, and all his servants, and all the Egyptians; and there was a great cry in Egypt; for not a house where not one dead.

chapters.zh: 夜间，法老召了摩西、亚伦来，说：起来！连你们带以色列人，从我民中出去，依你们所说的，去事奉耶和华罢！
chapters.en: And he called for Moses and Aaron by night, and said, Rise up, get you forth from among my people, both ye and the children of Israel; and go, serve the LORD, as ye have said.

chapters.zh: 也依你们所说的，连羊群牛群带著走罢！并要为我祝福。
chapters.en: Also take your flocks and your herds, as ye have said, and be gone; and bless me also.

chapters.zh: 埃及人催促百姓，打发他们快快出离那地，因为埃及人说：我们都要死了。
chapters.en: And the Egyptians were urgent upon the people, that they might send them out of the land in haste; for they said, We all dead .

chapters.zh: 百姓就拿著没有酵的生面，把抟面盆包在衣服中，扛在肩头上。
chapters.en: And the people took their dough before it was leavened, their kneadingtroughs being bound up in their clothes upon their shoulders.

chapters.zh: 以色列人照著摩西的话行，向埃及人要金器、银器，和衣裳。
chapters.en: And the children of Israel did according to the word of Moses; and they borrowed of the Egyptians jewels of silver, and jewels of gold, and raiment:

chapters.zh: 耶和华叫百姓在埃及人眼前蒙恩，以致埃及人给他们所要的。他们就把埃及人的财物夺去了。
chapters.en: And the LORD gave the people favour in the sight of the Egyptians, so that they lent unto them . And they spoiled the Egyptians.

chapters.zh: 以色列人从兰塞起行，往疏割去；除了妇人孩子，步行的男人约有六十万。
chapters.en: And the children of Israel journeyed from Rameses to Succoth, about six hundred thousand on foot men, beside children.

chapters.zh: 又有许多闲杂人，并有羊群牛群，和他们一同上去。
chapters.en: And a mixed multitude went up also with them; and flocks, and herds, very much cattle.

chapters.zh: 他们用埃及带出来的生面烤成无酵饼。这生面原没有发起；因为他们被催逼离开埃及，不能耽延，也没有为自己预备甚么食物。
chapters.en: And they baked unleavened cakes of the dough which they brought forth out of Egypt, for it was not leavened; because they were thrust out of Egypt, and could not tarry, neither had they prepared for themselves any victual.

chapters.zh: 以色列人住在埃及共有四百三十年。
chapters.en: Now the sojourning of the children of Israel, who dwelt in Egypt, four hundred and thirty years.

chapters.zh: 正满了四百三十年的那一天，耶和华的军队都从埃及地出来了。
chapters.en: And it came to pass at the end of the four hundred and thirty years, even the selfsame day it came to pass, that all the hosts of the LORD went out from the land of Egypt.

chapters.zh: 这夜是耶和华的夜；因耶和华领他们出了埃及地，所以当向耶和华谨守，是以色列众人世世代代该谨守的。
chapters.en: It a night to be much observed unto the LORD for bringing them out from the land of Egypt: this that night of the LORD to be observed of all the children of Israel in their generations.

chapters.zh: 耶和华对摩西、亚伦说：逾越节的例是这样：外邦人都不可吃这羊羔。
chapters.en: And the LORD said unto Moses and Aaron, This the ordinance of the passover: There shall no stranger eat thereof:

chapters.zh: 但各人用银子买的奴仆，既受了割礼就可以吃。
chapters.en: But every man's servant that is bought for money, when thou hast circumcised him, then shall he eat thereof.

chapters.zh: 寄居的和雇工人都不可吃。
chapters.en: A foreigner and an hired servant shall not eat thereof.

chapters.zh: 应当在一个房子里吃；不可把一点肉从房子里带到外头去。羊羔的骨头一根也不可折断。
chapters.en: In one house shall it be eaten; thou shalt not carry forth ought of the flesh abroad out of the house; neither shall ye break a bone thereof.

chapters.zh: 以色列全会众都要守这礼。
chapters.en: All the congregation of Israel shall keep it.

chapters.zh: 若有外人寄居在你们中间，愿向耶和华守逾越节，他所有的男子务要受割礼，然后才容他前来遵守，他也就像本地人一样；但未受割礼的，都不可吃这羊羔。
chapters.en: And when a stranger shall sojourn with thee, and will keep the passover to the LORD, let all his males be circumcised, and then let him come near and keep it; and he shall be as one that is born in the land: for no uncircumcised person shall eat thereof.

chapters.zh: 本地人和寄居在你们中间的外人同归一例。
chapters.en: One law shall be to him that is homeborn, and unto the stranger that sojourneth among you.

chapters.zh: 耶和华怎样吩咐摩西、亚伦，以色列众人就怎样行了。
chapters.en: Thus did all the children of Israel; as the LORD commanded Moses and Aaron, so did they.

chapters.zh: 正当那日，耶和华将以色列人按著他们的军队，从埃及地领出来。
chapters.en: And it came to pass the selfsame day, the LORD did bring the children of Israel out of the land of Egypt by their armies.

chapters.zh: 耶和华晓谕摩西说：
chapters.en: And the LORD spake unto Moses, saying,

chapters.zh: 以色列中凡头生的，无论是人是牲畜，都是我的，要分别为圣归我。
chapters.en: Sanctify unto me all the firstborn, whatsoever openeth the womb among the children of Israel, of man and of beast: it mine.

chapters.zh: 摩西对百姓说：你们要记念从埃及为奴之家出来的这日，因为耶和华用大能的手将你们从这地方领出来。有酵的饼都不可吃。
chapters.en: And Moses said unto the people, Remember this day, in which ye came out from Egypt, out of the house of bondage; for by strength of hand the LORD brought you out from this : there shall no leavened bread be eaten.

chapters.zh: 亚笔月间的这日是你们出来的日子。
chapters.en: This day came ye out in the month Abib.

chapters.zh: 将来耶和华领你进迦南人、赫人、亚摩利人、希未人、耶布斯人之地，就是他向你的祖宗起誓应许给你那流奶与蜜之地，那时你要在这月间守这礼。
chapters.en: And it shall be when the LORD shall bring thee into the land of the Canaanites, and the Hittites, and the Amorites, and the Hivites, and the Jebusites, which he sware unto thy fathers to give thee, a land flowing with milk and honey, that thou shalt keep this service in this month.

chapters.zh: 你要吃无酵饼七日，到第七日要向耶和华守节。
chapters.en: Seven days thou shalt eat unleavened bread, and in the seventh day a feast to the LORD.

chapters.zh: 这七日之久，要吃无酵饼；在你四境之内不可见有酵的饼，也不可见发酵的物。
chapters.en: Unleavened bread shall be eaten seven days; and there shall no leavened bread be seen with thee, neither shall there be leaven seen with thee in all thy quarters.

chapters.zh: 当那日，你要告诉你的儿子说：这是因耶和华在我出埃及的时候为我所行的事。
chapters.en: And thou shalt shew thy son in that day, saying, because of that the LORD did unto me when I came forth out of Egypt.

chapters.zh: 这要在你手上作记号，在你额上作纪念，使耶和华的律法常在你口中，因为耶和华曾用大能的手将你从埃及领出来。
chapters.en: And it shall be for a sign unto thee upon thine hand, and for a memorial between thine eyes, that the LORD'S law may be in thy mouth: for with a strong hand hath the LORD brought thee out of Egypt.

chapters.zh: 所以你每年要按著日期守这例。
chapters.en: Thou shalt therefore keep this ordinance in his season from year to year.

chapters.zh: 将来，耶和华照他向你和你祖宗所起的誓将你领进迦南人之地，把这地赐给你，
chapters.en: And it shall be when the LORD shall bring thee into the land of the Canaanites, as he sware unto thee and to thy fathers, and shall give it thee,

chapters.zh: 那时你要将一切头生的，并牲畜中头生的，归给耶和华；公的都要属耶和华。
chapters.en: That thou shalt set apart unto the LORD all that openeth the matrix, and every firstling that cometh of a beast which thou hast; the males the LORD'S.

chapters.zh: 凡头生的驴，你要用羊羔代赎；若不代赎，就要打折他的颈项。凡你儿子中头生的都要赎出来。
chapters.en: And every firstling of an ass thou shalt redeem with a lamb; and if thou wilt not redeem it, then thou shalt break his neck: and all the firstborn of man among thy children shalt thou redeem.

chapters.zh: 日后，你的儿子问你说：这是甚么意思？你就说：耶和华用大能的手将我们从埃及为奴之家领出来。
chapters.en: And it shall be when thy son asketh thee in time to come, saying, What this? that thou shalt say unto him, By strength of hand the LORD brought us out from Egypt, from the house of bondage:

chapters.zh: 那时法老几乎不容我们去，耶和华就把埃及地所有头生的，无论是人是牲畜，都杀了。因此，我把一切头生的公牲畜献给耶和华为祭，但将头生的儿子都赎出来。
chapters.en: And it came to pass, when Pharaoh would hardly let us go, that the LORD slew all the firstborn in the land of Egypt, both the firstborn of man, and the firstborn of beast: therefore I sacrifice to the LORD all that openeth the matrix, being males; but all the firstborn of my children I redeem.

chapters.zh: 这要在你手上作记号，在你额上作经文，因为耶和华用大能的手将我们从埃及领出来。
chapters.en: And it shall be for a token upon thine hand, and for frontlets between thine eyes: for by strength of hand the LORD brought us forth out of Egypt.

chapters.zh: 法老容百姓去的时候，非利士地的道路虽近，神却不领他们从那里走；因为神说：恐怕百姓遇见打仗后悔，就回埃及去。
chapters.en: And it came to pass, when Pharaoh had let the people go, that God led them not the way of the land of the Philistines, although that near; for God said, Lest peradventure the people repent when they see war, and they return to Egypt:

chapters.zh: 所以神领百姓绕道而行，走红海旷野的路。以色列人出埃及地，都带著兵器上去。
chapters.en: But God led the people about, the way of the wilderness of the Red sea: and the children of Israel went up harnessed out of the land of Egypt.

chapters.zh: 摩西把约瑟的骸骨一同带去；因为约瑟曾叫以色列人严严地起誓，对他们说：神必眷顾你们，你们要把我的骸骨从这里一同带上去。
chapters.en: And Moses took the bones of Joseph with him: for he had straitly sworn the children of Israel, saying, God will surely visit you; and ye shall carry up my bones away hence with you.

chapters.zh: 他们从疏割起行，在旷野边的以倘安营。
chapters.en: And they took their journey from Succoth, and encamped in Etham, in the edge of the wilderness.

chapters.zh: 日间，耶和华在云柱中领他们的路；夜间，在火柱中光照他们，使他们日夜都可以行走。
chapters.en: And the LORD went before them by day in a pillar of a cloud, to lead them the way; and by night in a pillar of fire, to give them light; to go by day and night:

chapters.zh: 日间云柱，夜间火柱，总不离开百姓的面前。
chapters.en: He took not away the pillar of the cloud by day, nor the pillar of fire by night, before the people.

chapters.zh: 耶和华晓谕摩西说：
chapters.en: And the LORD spake unto Moses, saying,

chapters.zh: 你吩咐以色列人转回，安营在比哈希录前，密夺和海的中间，对著巴力洗分，靠近海边安营。
chapters.en: Speak unto the children of Israel, that they turn and encamp before Pihahiroth, between Migdol and the sea, over against Baalzephon: before it shall ye encamp by the sea.

chapters.zh: 法老必说：以色列人在地中绕迷了，旷野把他们困住了。
chapters.en: For Pharaoh will say of the children of Israel, They entangled in the land, the wilderness hath shut them in.

chapters.zh: 我要使法老的心刚硬，他要追赶他们，我便在法老和他全军身上得荣耀；埃及人就知道我是耶和华。于是以色列人这样行了。
chapters.en: And I will harden Pharaoh's heart, that he shall follow after them; and I will be honoured upon Pharaoh, and upon all his host; that the Egyptians may know that I the LORD. And they did so.

chapters.zh: 有人告诉埃及王说：百姓逃跑。法老和他的臣仆就向百姓变心，说：我们容以色列人去，不再服事我们，这做的是甚么事呢？
chapters.en: And it was told the king of Egypt that the people fled: and the heart of Pharaoh and of his servants was turned against the people, and they said, Why have we done this, that we have let Israel go from serving us?

chapters.zh: 法老就预备他的车辆，带领军兵同去，
chapters.en: And he made ready his chariot, and took his people with him:

chapters.zh: 并带著六百辆特选的车和埃及所有的车，每辆都有车兵长。
chapters.en: And he took six hundred chosen chariots, and all the chariots of Egypt, and captains over every one of them.

chapters.zh: 耶和华使埃及王法老的心刚硬，他就追赶以色列人，因为以色列人是昂然无惧地出埃及。
chapters.en: And the LORD hardened the heart of Pharaoh king of Egypt, and he pursued after the children of Israel: and the children of Israel went out with an high hand.

chapters.zh: 埃及人追赶他们，法老一切的马匹、车辆、马兵，与军兵就在海边上，靠近比哈希录，对著巴力洗分，在他们安营的地方追上了。
chapters.en: But the Egyptians pursued after them, all the horses chariots of Pharaoh, and his horsemen, and his army, and overtook them encamping by the sea, beside Pihahiroth, before Baalzephon.

chapters.zh: 法老临近的时候，以色列人举目看见埃及人赶来，就甚惧怕，向耶和华哀求。
chapters.en: And when Pharaoh drew nigh, the children of Israel lifted up their eyes, and, behold, the Egyptians marched after them; and they were sore afraid: and the children of Israel cried out unto the LORD.

chapters.zh: 他们对摩西说：难道在埃及没有坟地，你把我们带来死在旷野么？你为甚么这样待我们，将我们从埃及领出来呢？
chapters.en: And they said unto Moses, Because no graves in Egypt, hast thou taken us away to die in the wilderness? wherefore hast thou dealt thus with us, to carry us forth out of Egypt?

chapters.zh: 我们在埃及岂没有对你说过，不要搅扰我们，容我们服事埃及人么？因为服事埃及人比死在旷野还好。
chapters.en: not this the word that we did tell thee in Egypt, saying, Let us alone, that we may serve the Egyptians? For better for us to serve the Egyptians, than that we should die in the wilderness.

chapters.zh: 摩西对百姓说：不要惧怕，只管站住！看耶和华今天向你们所要施行的救恩。因为，你们今天所看见的埃及人必永远不再看见了。
chapters.en: And Moses said unto the people, Fear ye not, stand still, and see the salvation of the LORD, which he will shew to you to day: for the Egyptians whom ye have seen to day, ye shall see them again no more for ever.

chapters.zh: 耶和华必为你们争战；你们只管静默，不要作声。
chapters.en: The LORD shall fight for you, and ye shall hold your peace.

chapters.zh: 耶和华对摩西说：你为甚么向我哀求呢？你吩咐以色列人往前走。
chapters.en: And the LORD said unto Moses, Wherefore criest thou unto me? speak unto the children of Israel, that they go forward:

chapters.zh: 你举手向海伸杖，把水分开。以色列人要下海中走干地。
chapters.en: But lift thou up thy rod, and stretch out thine hand over the sea, and divide it: and the children of Israel shall go on dry through the midst of the sea.

chapters.zh: 我要使埃及人的心刚硬，他们就跟著下去。我要在法老和他的全军、车辆、马兵上得荣耀。
chapters.en: And I, behold, I will harden the hearts of the Egyptians, and they shall follow them: and I will get me honour upon Pharaoh, and upon all his host, upon his chariots, and upon his horsemen.

chapters.zh: 我在法老和他的车辆、马兵上得荣耀的时候，埃及人就知道我是耶和华了。
chapters.en: And the Egyptians shall know that I the LORD, when I have gotten me honour upon Pharaoh, upon his chariots, and upon his horsemen.

chapters.zh: 在以色列营前行走神的使者，转到他们后边去；云柱也从他们前边转到他们后边立住。
chapters.en: And the angel of God, which went before the camp of Israel, removed and went behind them; and the pillar of the cloud went from before their face, and stood behind them:

chapters.zh: 在埃及营和以色列营中间有云柱，一边黑暗，一边发光，终夜两下不得相近。
chapters.en: And it came between the camp of the Egyptians and the camp of Israel; and it was a cloud and darkness , but it gave light by night : so that the one came not near the other all the night.

chapters.zh: 摩西向海伸杖，耶和华便用大东风，使海水一夜退去，水便分开，海就成了干地。
chapters.en: And Moses stretched out his hand over the sea; and the LORD caused the sea to go by a strong east wind all that night, and made the sea dry , and the waters were divided.

chapters.zh: 以色列人下海中走干地，水在他们的左右作了墙垣。
chapters.en: And the children of Israel went into the midst of the sea upon the dry : and the waters a wall unto them on their right hand, and on their left.

chapters.zh: 埃及人追赶他们，法老一切的马匹、车辆，和马兵都跟著下到海中。
chapters.en: And the Egyptians pursued, and went in after them to the midst of the sea, all Pharaoh's horses, his chariots, and his horsemen.

chapters.zh: 到了晨更的时候，耶和华从云火柱中向埃及的军兵观看，使埃及的军兵混乱了；
chapters.en: And it came to pass, that in the morning watch the LORD looked unto the host of the Egyptians through the pillar of fire and of the cloud, and troubled the host of the Egyptians,

chapters.zh: 又使他们的车轮脱落难以行走，以致埃及人说：我们从以色列人面前逃跑罢！因耶和华为他们攻击我们了
chapters.en: And took off their chariot wheels, that they drave them heavily: so that the Egyptians said, Let us flee from the face of Israel; for the LORD fighteth for them against the Egyptians.

chapters.zh: 耶和华对摩西说：你向海伸杖，叫水仍合在埃及人并他们的车辆、马兵身上。
chapters.en: And the LORD said unto Moses, Stretch out thine hand over the sea, that the waters may come again upon the Egyptians, upon their chariots, and upon their horsemen.

chapters.zh: 摩西就向海伸杖，到了天一亮，海水仍旧复原。埃及人避水逃跑的时候，耶和华把他们推翻在海中，
chapters.en: And Moses stretched forth his hand over the sea, and the sea returned to his strength when the morning appeared; and the Egyptians fled against it; and the LORD overthrew the Egyptians in the midst of the sea.

chapters.zh: 水就回流，淹没了车辆和马兵。那些跟著以色列人下海法老的全军，连一个也没有剩下。
chapters.en: And the waters returned, and covered the chariots, and the horsemen, all the host of Pharaoh that came into the sea after them; there remained not so much as one of them.

chapters.zh: 以色列人却在海中走干地；水在他们的左右作了墙垣。
